finding_results.notes: Removed the immediate abstract diagnosis after Vess fails to retrieve her sister's name, let the emotional cutoff land through Vess's own missing-feeling beat, and replaced the post-'The System' paraphrase run with Maren's concrete instruction that both fragments report future gaps as they happen.
The opening now uses sensory road detail and specific guilt imagery instead of repeating the 'eleven years' phrasing or re-explaining the System-sighted versus Maren contrast.
Thessa's warning remains, but the repeat clinical/infrastructure simile has been removed so the warning itself carries the beat.
